name: SCC_SLAC_SetAttenuation
title: SCC_SLAC_SetAttenuation
syntax: long SCC_SLAC_SetAttenuation ( float AttenuationMean, float AttenuationDev )
description: Changes the probability distribution used to create attenuation characteristics when simulating a QCA chip. The values apply to all SLAC sessions, yet may be set each time an M-Sound is received using the indication SCC_CM_MNBC_Sound_Ind.
